SKYRIM_LP.Title: Lockpicking
SKYRIM_LP.Help: Move the mouse to angle the pick. Hold [Z] or [↑] to force the cylinder.
SKYRIM_LP.Notify.Failure: You failed to pick the lock.
SKYRIM_LP.Notify.NoActor: No actor selected: using the default pick counter.
SKYRIM_LP.Notify.NoGM: No GM is connected: the door cannot be unlocked.
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.InterceptDoors.Name: Intercept locked doors
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.InterceptDoors.Hint: Launches the lockpicking minigame when a locked canvas door is clicked.
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.Difficulty.Name: Default difficulty
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.Difficulty.Hint: Difficulty used when no difficulty is set on the door/chest.
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.DefaultPicks.Name: Default number of picks
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.DefaultPicks.Hint: Number of picks available when the actor has no 'pick' item.
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.PickItemName.Name: 'Pick' item name
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.PickItemName.Hint: Text searched (case-insensitive) in the actor's inventory to consume a pick.
SKYRIM_LP.Combo.Title: Combination Lock
SKYRIM_LP.Combo.Help: Turn the rings (▲▼, mouse wheel or ↑↓) to line up the right logos, then open.
SKYRIM_LP.Combo.Notify.Failure: You failed to find the combination.
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.LockType.Name: Default lock type
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.LockType.Hint: Minigame used when no type is set on the door/chest.
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.ComboRings.Name: Default number of rings
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.ComboRings.Hint: Number of rings on the combination lock when not set on the door.
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.ComboSymbols.Name: Lock logos
SKYRIM_LP.Settings.ComboSymbols.Hint: Comma-separated list of logos: Font Awesome classes (e.g. 'fa-solid fa-star'), image paths (.png/.svg), or plain letters/digits.
SKYRIM_LP.Config.Title: Configure lock
SKYRIM_LP.Config.PaletteHint: Click to add or remove logos from the lock (minimum 2).
SKYRIM_LP.Config.CombinationHint: Click each ring to pick the correct logo.
SKYRIM_LP.Config.ShowHints: Show how many rings are correct after an attempt
SKYRIM_LP.Config.TestSuccess: Test passed: the lock would open.
SKYRIM_LP.Config.MinIcons: The lock needs at least 2 logos.
SKYRIM_LP.Config.CustomHint: Enter an icon, an emoji/letter, OR choose an image.
SKYRIM_LP.Config.CustomGlyph: Font Awesome icon, emoji or letter
SKYRIM_LP.Config.PicksHint: 0 = automatic (uses the player's number of lockpicks).
SKYRIM_LP.Config.Name: Minigame name
SKYRIM_LP.MG.Empty: No minigames yet. Click "Minigame" to create one.
SKYRIM_LP.MG.DeleteFolderConfirm: Delete this folder? Its contents will move to the root.
SKYRIM_LP.MG.NoPlayers: No connected player to submit the minigame to.
SKYRIM_LP.MG.SubmitHint: Choose which players must complete the minigame:
SKYRIM_LP.MG.ResultNoPicks: Impossible: {name} has no lockpick — minigame "{game}" cannot run.
SKYRIM_LP.MG.NoPicksPlayer: You have no lockpick: the minigame cannot run.
